arts.ttl: Brighton XI vs Manchester City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Brighton travel to Manchester City this afternoon hoping to extend their impressive winning run. The Seagulls have won six straight games in all competitions, a club record as a top-flight side. Brighton’s good form has carried Fabian Hurzeler’s side into the race for Champions League qualification and secured progress to the FA Cup quarter-finals. Pep Guardiola’s side can climb into the top four with a win, with fourth-placed Chelsea not in action until Sunday, when the West Londoners face Arsenal. arts.ttl: Tuchel issues Grealish warning – but insists he remains part of plans
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel insists Jack Grealish is still very much part of his England plans going forward, but he has warned him about how his behaviour off the pitch might be perceived, and says he has a responsibility to appear more "calm".
